name: rate_type_with_matched_column_params
description: Verify that play-level params are applied to denominator CTE when rate_type_match_column_params is true
expected_query: with "t530f9306f83a7fc0e4b633afbf189c59" as (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "tf6b570501f941c528076c2ce00adc57f" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", CAST(tf6b570501f941c528076c2ce00adc57f.trg_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t530f9306f83a7fc0e4b633afbf189c59.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t530f9306f83a7fc0e4b633afbf189c59" on "t530f9306f83a7fc0e4b633afbf189c59"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tf6b570501f941c528076c2ce00adc57f" on "tf6b570501f941c528076c2ce00adc57f"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tf6b570501f941c528076c2ce00adc57f"."trg_from_plays", t530f9306f83a7fc0e4b633afbf189c59.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
